PRD-CHAT-E1-S3:18@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.fix: Replace with measurable Given-When-Then: '100 consecutive frames render, <5% drop below 60fps on a mid-range Android' and 'first 50 messages reach time-to-interactive <=1.5s p95 on 4G'. Pin the device + network profile in frontmatter.
PRD-CHAT-E1-S3:18@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.why: The test author has no threshold to assert against; the story ships with its AC permanently interpreted by whoever runs the demo, and is unsizeable as written.

PRD-CHAT-E1-S4:18@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.fix: Split into discrete testable stories, one mechanism each (block→server rejects with 403 and stores nothing; report→queued to review SLA; encryption→server-side log verification). Retire the catch-all.
PRD-CHAT-E1-S4:18@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.why: An unbounded safety contract on a medium should-have is a blank check: any build trivially claims compliance because the system does something, the AC stays vacuously true until a real incident blocks release, and it can never be sized or accepted.

PRD-CHAT-E1-S4:22@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.fix: Rename to a concrete mechanism ('Block + report + encrypt in 1:1 chat') so the title states what is built, not an outcome that cannot be tested.
PRD-CHAT-E1-S4:22@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.why: A title that asserts an absolute sets a reader expectation the body can never satisfy and primes every downstream reviewer to wave the story through on vibes; the unmeasurability is now structural, top to bottom.

PRD-CHAT:15@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.fix: Add a sustained-conversation metric (e.g. sustained-7day-conversation-rate) to PRD-CHAT success and demote mau-monthly to a leading funnel indicator. This is the build-side of DEC-1.
PRD-CHAT:15@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.why: Teams build to the metric they are graded on. Grade chat on MAU and the team ships notification spam and re-engagement loops that lift logins while the conversation-retention north-star stays unowned — the exact vanity-volume trap the product was founded to escape.

PRD-CHAT:22@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.fix: Either name what the chat does that Tinder/Bumble do not (conversation-sustaining nudges, 7-day streak signals) and rate it ahead there, or record that chat is intentionally at parity and the moat lives elsewhere.
PRD-CHAT:22@260603-prd-chat-lvl5.why: If chat is merely at parity with incumbents, it is not a reason to switch; the product's one claimed differentiator (sustained connection) has to live IN the chat experience or the parity rating is an admission of me-too.
